temperatures.note: Both require warm layers. Layering recommended over single thick garment.

timing_guidelines.day1_latest_pickup: 16:00 WIB (applies to all packages starting in Surabaya)
timing_guidelines.last_day_flight_minimum: Depart no earlier than 18:00 WIB; 20:00 WIB is safer
timing_guidelines.note: These apply to packages starting or ending in Surabaya

monthly_rijik.schedule: First Friday of every month, 00:00–23:59 WIB
monthly_rijik.scope: Total closure of TWA Kawah Ijen — ALL tourism and mining activities
monthly_rijik.purpose: Ecosystem cleaning (100–150 kg waste removal from Paltuding to crater rim) + Cemara Gunung planting

ijen_closures.additional: Issued by BBKSDA East Java based on volcanic gas levels and safety assessments

dry_season.quality: Best overall. Clear skies for Bromo sunrise and Ijen blue fire. Peak season — book 2–4 weeks ahead.

shoulder.quality: Viable. Mix of dry/wet. Blue fire odds slightly lower. Fewer crowds.

wet_season.quality: Risky. Heavy rain affects trails. JVTO still operates but issues weather advisories.

seasonal_guide.ramadan: Hotels and tours fully operational. Meal scheduling may be adjusted.

yadnya_kasada.description: Annual Tengger Hindu ceremony at Pura Luhur Poten (Bromo caldera floor)
yadnya_kasada.date_type: Variable — lunar calendar, shifts each year
yadnya_kasada.impact: Bromo area extremely crowded. JVTO activates Plan-B SOP.

ijen_practical.trolley_ojek: Man-powered porter service — extra cost, arranged on-site (NOT a JVTO inclusion)
ijen_practical.screening_location: Nurse visits guest hotel evening before hike (Bondowoso / Banyuwangi area)
ijen_practical.trek_difficulty: Moderate — ~1.5–2 hours each way; steep rocky trail
ijen_practical.gas_mask: Provided by JVTO as standard inclusion on all Ijen-relevant packages
ijen_practical.gate_rule: No Valid QR Code = No Crater Zone Access (BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024)

bromo_practical.milky_way: Available on overnight packages departing ~02:00 WIB (weather permitting)
bromo_practical.horse_riding: Optional, extra cost, arranged on-site (NOT a JVTO inclusion)
bromo_practical.luggage: Main luggage stays at hotel during sunrise sequence; guests carry daypack only
bromo_practical.yadnya_kasada_impact: JVTO activates Plan-B SOP for bookings during this festival period

tumpak_sewu.trail: Steep, wet — fixed ropes and handholds on canyon descent
tumpak_sewu.helmets: Local site management provision — NOT a JVTO inclusion

madakaripura.trail: Canyon approach: wading through stream, narrow passages, wet stones
madakaripura.note: You WILL get wet — waterproof bags + change of clothes essential
madakaripura.helmets: Local site management provision — NOT a JVTO inclusion per packages-overview §madakaripura-caveat

allowed: Hotel room category upgrade (may cost extra)
Optional on-site activities (horse riding, trolley ojek)
not_offered: Significant route changes altering primary destination sequence

dietary_accommodation.requirement: Must be declared at booking — cannot be confirmed on arrival

room_allocation.note: JVTO manages hotel bookings on guests' behalf. Hotel name on voucher is binding.

banyuwangi_ijen_bali_origin.name: Luminor Hotel
banyuwangi_ijen_bali_origin.note: Primary for Bali-origin packages entering via Banyuwangi
